summary: Settings page bug fixes verified - All 3 issues fixed: 1) securitySettings state added, 2) saveSettings call removed, 3) PUT /api/auth/password endpoint working. Settings page loads without runtime errors, Security section works, login alerts toggle works, blocked users modal opens/closes, password change works.

settings_page: Settings page loads without runtime errors
All settings sections visible: Account, Privacy, Security, Notifications, Display, Language, Help, About, Logout
security_section: Change Password button visible and clickable
Login Alerts toggle visible and functional (green when ON)
login_alerts_toggle: Toggle is interactive and changes state
blocked_users_modal: Shows 'لا يوجد مستخدمون محظورون' when no blocked users
password_change: Password modal opens when clicking 'تغيير كلمة المرور'
Three password fields visible: Current, New, Confirm
Success toast 'تم تغيير كلمة المرور' displayed after save
privacy_section: All privacy toggles visible and functional

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.js line 39: securitySettings useState correctly added with twoFactorEnabled and loginAlerts
SettingsPage.js: saveSettings function call removed - no longer causes errors
server.py lines 488-511: PUT /api/auth/password endpoint correctly implemented with password verification and hashing
seed_data_creation: Updated test user password to match test credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page bug fixes verified. All 3 reported issues (securitySettings error, saveSettings error, password change) have been fixed and tested. The app is in Arabic RTL mode. Test user: naifliver@gmail.com / As11223344
